title: 3 x Nuage Vapour Patch 6pk – Decongestant Relief for Catarrh & Blocked Nose – Infused with Menthol, Camphor & Eucalyptus Oil – 18 Patches Total
features: 🌿 Effective Decongestant Relief – Combines menthol, camphor, and eucalyptus oil to ease catarrh, clear nasal passages, and support easy breathing.
😌 Breathe Easy Day or Night – Ideal for use during colds, allergies, or congestion, providing soothing vapour relief while you rest or go about your day.
✅ Easy to Use – Simply apply patch to outer clothing near the chest or place on a pillow (at least 30cm from face). No direct skin contact required.
💤 Non-Medicated & Gentle – Natural vapour therapy without harsh chemicals.
📦 Value Triple Pack – Includes 3 x Packs of 6 Patches (18 Patches Total) – Convenient for home, travel, or on-the-go relief.
description: Relieve blocked noses and breathe clearly again with Nuage Vapour Patches. This triple pack includes 3 x 6 Patch Packs (18 total) designed to help soothe catarrh, congestion, and general nasal discomfort. Each patch is infused with menthol, camphor, and eucalyptus oil — a natural blend known for its powerful decongestant and refreshing properties. These discreet and easy-to-use patches can be applied to your clothing or a pillow, ensuring cool, clear breathing whether you’re relaxing at home or sleeping. There’s no need to apply directly to the skin, making them a mess-free alternative to traditional rubs or sprays. Perfect for cold and allergy seasons, Nuage Vapour Patches are a must-have in every home medicine cabinet.
